title: Meme Beds
body:
# Meme Beds in Minecraft
![Meme Beds](https://i.postimg.cc/J0CGS1Rw/2026-03-24-19-53-21.png)

## Download Instructions

- Download the version of Meme Beds

- Put the downloaded file in the ".minecraft>resourcepacks" folder

- Run Minecraft!!!

- Click on "Options"

- Click on "Resource Packs"

- Choose "Meme Beds"

## Others project

- [Totem Meme Cat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-cat-meme) meme cat resource set
- [3D Sun & Moons - Reborn Cat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-sun-moons-reborn-cat) 3d sun and Moons Reborn!
- [Bunker Game Cards](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bunker-freedom) happy game cards bunker
- [Mafia Game Cards](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mafia-freedom) happy game cards mafia
